channel.title: Meshy AI
channel.description: Meshy AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Best Tolerances for 3D Printing LEGO-Compatible Bricks - Blog
item.description: Learn the exact tolerance settings and slicer offsets that give LEGO-compatible bricks proper clutch power on Bambu Lab and Ender 3 printers.

item.title: Photo to 3D Model: Create & Sell Designs with AI
item.description: Learn how to turn any photo into a sellable 3D model with Meshy AI. Upload, customize, and export designs to 3D print or sell as unique products.

item.title: AI 3D Model Generation for Education: How Thitikorn Transformed Classroom Learning with Meshy AI - Blog
item.description: Learn how a Thai university lecturer uses Meshy to help students turn 2D sketches into 3D printed models, making AI-assisted 3D creation accessible in the classroom.
